missingSurface: The pharmacy mission stack reserves safe-area and scroll space for the sticky dock, queue drawer, and promoted support region, but the shell does not yet consume live visualViewport or software-keyboard occlusion telemetry to retune those offsets at runtime.
temporaryFallback: 364 keeps the dock and resume stub hit-safe by reserving bottom layout space, making only actionable dock controls pointer-active, and routing support or recovery work through bounded in-shell cards and drawers.
riskIfUnresolved: Some mobile browsers may still require extra manual scrolling when the on-screen keyboard compresses the viewport during longer recovery or support interactions.
